tasks.title: Define TypeScript types for agent launcher
tasks.description: Add AgentInfo, AgentRun, PipelineState, PipelineStage, AgentSettings, PromptGenerationRequest, PromptGenerationResponse types to frontend/src/types/index.ts.
acceptance_criteria: AgentInfo type has: id, name, displayName, path, sizeBytes
AgentRun type has: taskId, agentId, spaceId, startedAt, cliCommand, promptPath
PipelineStage type is a union: 'senior-architect' | 'ux-api-designer' | 'developer-agent' | 'qa-engineer-e2e'
PipelineState type has: spaceId, stages (PipelineStage[]), currentStageIndex, startedAt, status ('running' | 'paused' | 'completed' | 'aborted')
AgentSettings type has: cli (tool, binary, flags, promptFlag, fileInputMethod), pipeline (autoAdvance, confirmBetweenStages, stages), prompts (includeKanbanBlock, includeGitBlock, workingDirectory)
PromptGenerationRequest and PromptGenerationResponse match the POST /api/v1/agent/prompt contract from the blueprint
All types are exported from types/index.ts
tsc --noEmit passes with zero errors

tasks.title: Add agent and settings API client functions
tasks.description: Extend frontend/src/api/client.ts with typed wrappers for GET /api/v1/agents, GET /api/v1/agents/:agentId, POST /api/v1/agent/prompt, GET /api/v1/settings, PUT /api/v1/settings.
acceptance_criteria: getAgents(): Promise<AgentInfo[]> calls GET /api/v1/agents
getAgent(agentId: string): Promise<AgentInfo & { content: string }> calls GET /api/v1/agents/:agentId
generatePrompt(req: PromptGenerationRequest): Promise<PromptGenerationResponse> calls POST /api/v1/agent/prompt
getSettings(): Promise<AgentSettings> calls GET /api/v1/settings
saveSettings(partial: Partial<AgentSettings>): Promise<AgentSettings> calls PUT /api/v1/settings
All functions use the existing apiFetch wrapper
All functions are exported from api/client.ts

tasks.title: Implement GET /api/v1/agents endpoint
tasks.description: Add server-side endpoint to list available agent .md files from ~/.claude/agents/. Reuse the scanning pattern from buildConfigRegistry() but return a simplified agent-specific response.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/agents returns 200 with array of { id, name, displayName, path, sizeBytes }
id is kebab-case stem of filename (e.g. 'senior-architect' from 'senior-architect.md')
displayName is title-cased stem (e.g. 'Senior Architect')
Returns empty array if ~/.claude/agents/ does not exist
Response latency <100ms p99
Route is registered in the router function with a regex constant

tasks.title: Implement GET /api/v1/agents/:agentId endpoint
tasks.description: Add endpoint to read the full content of a specific agent .md file by its kebab-case ID.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/agents/senior-architect returns 200 with { id, name, displayName, content }
Returns 404 with AGENT_NOT_FOUND error if file does not exist
Path traversal prevented: only serves files from ~/.claude/agents/ directory
Content is read as UTF-8 text
Response latency <100ms p99

tasks.title: Implement POST /api/v1/agent/prompt endpoint
tasks.description: Add endpoint that assembles a full agent prompt from task data + agent content + instruction blocks, writes it to data/.prompts/ as a temp file, and returns the absolute path plus a CLI command string.
acceptance_criteria: Accepts { agentId, taskId, spaceId, customInstructions?, workingDirectory? }
Reads task data from the space file on disk (not via HTTP)
Reads agent .md file content
Assembles prompt with sections: TASK CONTEXT, AGENT INSTRUCTIONS, KANBAN INSTRUCTIONS, GIT INSTRUCTIONS, PROJECT CONTEXT
Writes prompt to data/.prompts/prompt-{timestamp}-{taskId-prefix}.md using atomic write (.tmp + rename)
Creates data/.prompts/ directory if it does not exist
Returns 201 with { promptPath, promptPreview (first 500 chars), cliCommand, estimatedTokens }
cliCommand reads settings.json for CLI tool/flags; falls back to 'claude -p' default
Returns 400 for missing required fields, 404 for missing agent/task
Response latency <200ms p99

tasks.title: Implement GET/PUT /api/v1/settings endpoints
tasks.description: Add settings persistence using data/settings.json with atomic write pattern. GET returns current settings (with defaults if file missing). PUT merges partial update.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/settings returns full settings object with defaults when file does not exist

Default settings: cli.tool='claude', cli.binary='claude', cli.flags=['-p'], cli.promptFlag='-p', cli.fileInputMethod='cat-subshell', pipeline.autoAdvance=true, pipeline.confirmBetweenStages=true, pipeline.stages=['senior-architect','ux-api-designer','developer-agent','qa-engineer-e2e']
PUT /api/v1/settings accepts partial object, deep-merges with existing, writes atomically
PUT returns 200 with full merged settings
PUT returns 400 for invalid/empty body
Atomic write uses .tmp + rename pattern
data/settings.json is created on first PUT

tasks.title: Add prompt temp file cleanup
tasks.description: On server startup, clean up prompt files in data/.prompts/ older than 24 hours. Also run cleanup periodically (every 6 hours).
acceptance_criteria: On server startup, files in data/.prompts/ older than 24h are deleted
setInterval runs cleanup every 6 hours
Cleanup logs number of files removed at info level
Cleanup does not throw if data/.prompts/ does not exist
Cleanup is best-effort: errors on individual file deletes are logged but do not abort

tasks.title: Expose sendInput from useTerminal hook
tasks.description: Modify useTerminal to return a sendInput(data: string): boolean function that wraps send({ type: 'input', data }). This is the bridge for store-initiated terminal injection.
acceptance_criteria: useTerminal returns { containerRef, reconnectNow, sendInput }
sendInput(data) calls send({ type: 'input', data }) and returns the boolean result
sendInput is a stable useCallback ref (does not change between renders)
Existing terminal.onData keystroke relay is unaffected
Existing tests pass without modification

tasks.title: Add agentLauncher slice to Zustand store
tasks.description: Extend useAppStore with agent launcher state: terminalSender, availableAgents, activeRun, pipelineState, preparedRun (for preview modal). Add actions: setTerminalSender, loadAgents, prepareAgentRun, executeAgentRun, cancelAgentRun, clearActiveRun.
acceptance_criteria: terminalSender: ((data: string) => boolean) | null, initially null
setTerminalSender(fn) stores the function in state
availableAgents: AgentInfo[], initially empty
loadAgents() fetches GET /api/v1/agents and sets availableAgents
activeRun: AgentRun | null, initially null
preparedRun: { taskId, agentId, promptPath, cliCommand, promptPreview } | null
prepareAgentRun(taskId, agentId) calls POST /api/v1/agent/prompt, sets preparedRun, opens prompt preview modal
executeAgentRun() reads preparedRun, ensures terminal is open, calls terminalSender(cmd + '\n'), sets activeRun, clears preparedRun
executeAgentRun() shows error toast if terminalSender is null after retry
cancelAgentRun() sends '\x03' via terminalSender, clears activeRun
clearActiveRun() sets activeRun to null
pipelineState: PipelineState | null
Convenience selectors exported: useActiveRun, useAvailableAgents, usePipelineState

tasks.title: Add agentSettings slice to Zustand store
tasks.description: Extend useAppStore with settings state and actions: loadSettings, saveSettings. Persist to/from server via GET/PUT /api/v1/settings.
acceptance_criteria: agentSettings: AgentSettings | null, initially null
settingsLoading: boolean, initially false
loadSettings() fetches GET /api/v1/settings, sets agentSettings
saveSettings(partial) calls PUT /api/v1/settings, updates agentSettings, shows toast
loadSettings() called on app mount (alongside loadSpaces)
Convenience selector exported: useAgentSettings

tasks.title: Register terminal sendInput in store from TerminalPanel
tasks.description: Modify TerminalPanel to call setTerminalSender(sendInput) when terminal connects and setTerminalSender(null) on disconnect. This bridges the useTerminal hook to the Zustand store.
acceptance_criteria: TerminalPanel calls setTerminalSender(sendInput) after useTerminal returns
When terminal status changes to 'connected', terminalSender is non-null in store
When terminal status changes to 'disconnected', setTerminalSender(null) is called
On TerminalPanel unmount, setTerminalSender(null) is called via cleanup
No regressions in terminal functionality (input, output, resize, reconnect)

tasks.title: Build AgentLauncherMenu component
tasks.description: Create the dropdown menu that appears on TaskCard for selecting which agent to run. Shows available agents from the store plus a 'Run Pipeline' option.
acceptance_criteria: Renders as a dropdown triggered by a play/rocket icon button on TaskCard
Lists all agents from useAvailableAgents() with displayName
Includes a separator and 'Run Full Pipeline' option at the bottom
Clicking an agent calls prepareAgentRun(taskId, agentId)
Dropdown closes on selection or outside click
Disabled state when activeRun is non-null (show tooltip: 'Agent already running')
Uses Tailwind tokens: bg-surface-elevated, border-border, text-text-primary
Loads agents on first open if availableAgents is empty (lazy load)

tasks.title: Build AgentPromptPreview modal
tasks.description: Create a modal that shows the generated prompt preview and CLI command before execution. Allows editing the prompt and confirming execution.
acceptance_criteria: Uses the shared <Modal> component as base
Shows the CLI command string at the top in a monospace code block
Shows promptPreview in a scrollable, read-only textarea (or editable if user clicks 'Edit')
Displays estimatedTokens as a small badge
'Execute' button calls executeAgentRun() and closes modal
'Cancel' button clears preparedRun and closes modal
Modal opens when preparedRun is set (controlled by Zustand state)
Font: JetBrains Mono for code sections

tasks.title: Build AgentRunIndicator component
tasks.description: Create a badge/indicator that shows in the Header and optionally on the active TaskCard when an agent run is in progress.
acceptance_criteria: Shows a pulsing dot + 'Agent running' text in the Header when activeRun is non-null
Displays the agent displayName and elapsed time (updated every second)
Includes a 'Cancel' button that calls cancelAgentRun()
Hidden when activeRun is null
Uses animate-pulse Tailwind utility for the pulsing indicator
Material icon: 'smart_toy' or 'terminal'

tasks.title: Add Run Agent button to TaskCard
tasks.description: Modify TaskCard to include a 'Run Agent' icon button in the card footer that opens the AgentLauncherMenu dropdown.
acceptance_criteria: New icon button in card footer, positioned between move arrows and delete button
Uses material-symbols-outlined icon 'smart_toy' or 'play_arrow'
Button opens AgentLauncherMenu as a dropdown/popover
Button is disabled when activeRun is non-null or isMutating
Button only appears for tasks in 'todo' column (agents should not re-run done tasks)
Existing card layout is not broken (no overflow, correct spacing)

tasks.title: Build AgentSettingsPanel component
tasks.description: Create a settings panel (similar to ConfigPanel) for configuring the AI CLI tool, flags, and pipeline settings. Accessible from the Header.
acceptance_criteria: Panel with sections: CLI Tool (radio: claude/opencode/custom), Binary Path (text input), Flags (text input), Prompt Delivery Method (radio: cat-subshell/stdin-redirect/flag-file)
Pipeline section: Auto-advance toggle, Confirm between stages toggle, Stage order (read-only list)
Prompt section: Include Kanban block toggle, Include Git block toggle, Working directory (text input)
Save button calls saveSettings() which shows success/error toast
Uses Tailwind tokens consistent with ConfigPanel styling
Accessible via a settings icon in the Header (gear icon)

tasks.title: Implement useAgentCompletion hook
tasks.description: Create a hook that detects when an agent run has completed by watching the board state. When the task associated with activeRun moves to 'done', clear the activeRun. For pipeline mode, advance to the next stage.
acceptance_criteria: Hook subscribes to useAppStore board state changes
When activeRun is set and the associated task moves to 'done', calls clearActiveRun()
Shows toast: 'Agent run completed: {agentDisplayName}'
For pipeline mode: when all tasks tagged with current stage agent are in 'done', calls advancePipeline()
If pipeline.confirmBetweenStages is true, shows a confirmation toast before advancing
Does not trigger on board loads that happen before activeRun is set
Uses the existing 3s polling cycle (no new polling interval)

tasks.title: Build PipelineProgressBar component
tasks.description: Create a progress indicator showing current pipeline stage (1/4, 2/4, etc.) with stage names and status.
acceptance_criteria: Shows horizontal step indicator: architect -> ux -> dev -> qa
Current stage is highlighted (bg-primary), completed stages show checkmark, pending stages are dimmed
Displayed in the Header area when pipelineState is non-null
Hidden when pipelineState is null
Shows elapsed time since pipeline start
Includes 'Abort Pipeline' button that sets pipelineState to aborted

tasks.title: Implement pipeline orchestration in store
tasks.description: Add startPipeline(spaceId) and advancePipeline() actions. Pipeline iterates through stages, creating tasks if needed and launching agents sequentially.
acceptance_criteria: startPipeline(spaceId) sets pipelineState with stage 0 and triggers first agent
advancePipeline() increments currentStageIndex and launches next agent
If currentStageIndex >= stages.length, sets status to 'completed' and shows toast
Pipeline creates a prompt for the current stage agent using the space context
Pipeline passes artifacts from previous stages via the prompt template
abortPipeline() sends Ctrl+C to terminal and sets status to 'aborted'
Pipeline state survives board polling (not reset by loadBoard)

tasks.title: Add Header integration for AgentRunIndicator and settings
tasks.description: Modify Header component to include AgentRunIndicator (when running), PipelineProgressBar (when pipeline active), and a settings icon button.
acceptance_criteria: AgentRunIndicator renders in Header when activeRun is non-null
PipelineProgressBar renders in Header when pipelineState is non-null
Settings gear icon opens AgentSettingsPanel (or navigates to settings view)
Header layout remains stable: no content shift when indicators appear/disappear
All elements use existing Header styling patterns

tasks.title: Write unit tests for agent API client functions
tasks.description: Add Vitest tests for all new functions in api/client.ts: getAgents, getAgent, generatePrompt, getSettings, saveSettings.
acceptance_criteria: Tests mock fetch and verify correct URL, method, headers, body for each function
Tests verify response parsing matches TypeScript types
Tests verify error handling (non-2xx status throws Error with message)
Coverage >90% for new api/client.ts functions
All tests pass: cd frontend && npm test

tasks.title: Write unit tests for server-side agent endpoints
tasks.description: Add backend tests for GET /api/v1/agents, GET /api/v1/agents/:agentId, POST /api/v1/agent/prompt, GET /api/v1/settings, PUT /api/v1/settings.
acceptance_criteria: Tests use Node.js node:test runner (existing pattern)
GET /api/v1/agents: test with agents present and with empty agents dir
GET /api/v1/agents/:agentId: test found, not-found, path-traversal-blocked
POST /api/v1/agent/prompt: test successful generation, missing fields, missing agent, missing task
GET /api/v1/settings: test default settings, existing settings file
PUT /api/v1/settings: test partial update, invalid body, merge behavior
All tests pass: npm test
Temp files created by tests are cleaned up in afterEach

tasks.title: Write component tests for AgentLauncherMenu
tasks.description: Add Vitest + React Testing Library tests for the AgentLauncherMenu dropdown.
acceptance_criteria: Test: renders trigger button on TaskCard
Test: opens dropdown on click, shows agent list
Test: selecting an agent calls prepareAgentRun
Test: disabled state when activeRun is set
Test: closes on outside click
All tests pass: cd frontend && npm test

tasks.title: Write component tests for AgentPromptPreview modal
tasks.description: Add Vitest + React Testing Library tests for the prompt preview modal.
acceptance_criteria: Test: modal renders when preparedRun is set
Test: shows CLI command and prompt preview
Test: Execute button calls executeAgentRun
Test: Cancel button clears preparedRun
Test: modal not rendered when preparedRun is null
All tests pass: cd frontend && npm test
